textByHashes.9cd4977c9bbcf5161184dd3edf88d4907044b963: Your arm is pleased to see me?
textByHashes.eac2a4489bd46aeac12e23ff3c4fb647ced729d6: You are not boring - I like how My Arm talks. My father is Mother. He named me after a snowflake.
textByHashes.80ed41c8f5ce2f7cd4436cd82b81ae029101b077: I would like to spend more time with My Arm, yes.
textByHashes.b9f21b5c3bb64fb296ba6277fdf83662b058ceee: I wish My Arm did not have to leave.
textByHashes.5ce38605b502921c8d3b12780a8534f9e97f6327: My father, Mother, did not like me talking to My Arm. Whoever marries me will rule Weiss after Father retires or dies, and Father wishes that to be Don't Know What, the biggest sentry.
textByHashes.dcab5ca7165f912c58511115f5d4e4a6378b90f1: My Arm is not as big as Don't Know What, and I think he is less strong too. Father would not approve of him as a suitor for me.
textByHashes.d227efcfdfbaeef42647613331c95db7406ffb4e: He is different from other man-trolls. I know already that I want My Arm by my side.
textByHashes.e50c0cdc5398b3778433ed9e61234c2a8da8f54a: The choice should be from my heart, not from anyone else - though I like this plan very much!
textByHashes.b79006d7cbe1d300cc98bca26398e0fe3b4e0f50: How can we get Father to respect My Arm? He likes Don't Know What because Don't Know What is strong, but My Arm is... different.
textByHashes.67f9e1d902a1d4fc72a523ce6ed100124a7a1283: I would prefer you not to kill Father. He is cruel, but he is my blood.
textByHashes.49b34e6bd2a62962a92560523098c38a0eda4183: I do not think that would be wise, dear.
textByHashes.1bea9228b5b6177147793afe1bba2bb7a8307c9b: He is dumb, but he is big. I think this would not work.
textByHashes.278e4ec4971cb5005657de02b14022130e170e49: You know the mortal enemy of our people! What did you do in the fishing colony with him?
textByHashes.7a79d333ca545cdf0d8d5e9a1431aba4c989ead1: Very well. That Wise Young Man killed many of our people, and I am disappointed that you worked with him, but I shall overlook it for My Arm.
textByHashes.e0b23decb316e0ad5ad9599f52618963115db591: Very well. That Wise Young Man killed many of our people, and I am glad that you are different from him.
textByHashes.efa9bc390a8e2a94e642e6510a73f17460471d4a: Please ask him, ! For me and My Arm!
textByHashes.b5a8307e0dbac213e57670978ffe218853511e24: Um... thank you for the offer, but...
textByHashes.b56b5b9b51c016efcff434bce2d6d2e0fdc2c076: Have you asked the Wise Old Man to help us? We only need him to pretend to be dead, so My Arm can claim credit for killing him, and impress Father.
textByHashes.9b0302870eaad018e118dff57a62de24ca1268f1: Stop it, Father! You cannot tell me how to think, or how to live, or how to love. And I will be with My Arm.
textByHashes.87e3ae4def28eb10b10defbd89fd641201406a93: I am here. Father did not hurt me much. Can you stand, Odd Mushroom?
textByHashes.64d33e1ab00123281d532125512ad2a1b1f0f3e7: That hole leads down to the sea. But it's far too narrow for a troll to get through.
textByHashes.595aa8fc5c78a6b137bb62515fca26e5b58500fb: I know what I must do. With My Arm at my side, I will avenge you. You were always more of a father to me than Mother ever could be.
textByHashes.2a46e9079459322b839e545b7e8bf422bd791d8a: My Arm, , Old Man, we are going to get out of here, and punish my father for what he has done.
textByHashes.80a5f7866604e6458186d331c2c0e4d770a64adb: Father killed Odd Mushroom. Odd Mushroom was like a father to me. Mother must pay the price. Also I think he really will kill us all.
textByHashes.21aeebad968949455fd9f6aa33fc9bcb77802058: Old Man, do your magic and open that door!
textByHashes.047d74126c4aeb7309eb5f0f3cf754fc825d8203: I am sorry too. Father was flawed, but he did much for our people, and he should have retired with honour long ago.
textByHashes.2a9462c12d9a5585f36224a2851cfcf3e4111920: Old Man, , thank you both for your help.
textByHashes.380cbcebf193698c22bbeeda250344c8da7c130a: Very well. You will always be welcome here. Now, that is enough of the past. I feel the future beginning in Weiss... Let us summon my tribe.
textByHashes.c12d66c7730ccaf1db6debbc3cadb579e1d569c5: Trolls of Weiss, I am Snowflake, daughter of Mother, my father. Mother is dead, and I claim the throne.
textByHashes.b37c7deeb291c8ed91f2630bf88e991f7b0f31ce: Does any troll here challenge me?
textByHashes.7efc04649cb7433954ce85f21bd440814f7dd4ff: Then the throne of Weiss is mine. I also call you to witness our marriage. , please step forward.
textByHashes.566f5410a54019cc17a08a5b0bf3cb5b95cd6afd: I, Snowflake, give myself to My Arm. I take My Arm as my support and comforter. I will hold My Arm by my side for life.
textByHashes.18c85ce59647e88a88288c08629059c9dcba0e32: My Arm is my friend forever. I will share the sorrows of life with My Arm, and I will share the joys of love with My Arm.
textByHashes.38731da2c97762ab0ffeeff9497fe89cc6e394d8: We now perform the ancient dance of love...
textByHashes.f586f614c8ca1a43506b7de18b95b0c838b94691: , we owe you so much, and we will thank you - but we still need one small favour first.
textByHashes.2a7c7f56392007cbcede8c96e6cf8dfcf28edadc: Good. Now please fetch us some goat dung. You should find some in the goat pen outside. Meanwhile I need to assign some of my trolls to different duties around Weiss.
textByHashes.e34647d2b13951ec0d625bb20e5fd30b7d7e0d24: I think it will be useful to us. You will see why soon enough.
textByHashes.0c3d779e109781df0d2ab1efb2beae02cf44a5db: Have you got the goat dung?
textByHashes.36809698f4925bdd1b0311bc583c0b1d14f35f8e: You should find some in the goat pen outside. Meanwhile I need to assign some of my trolls to different duties around Weiss.
textByHashes.26563cd2da2b56bd6ec909e8ab0e8eb856ca8e1a: My Arm, what do you think, dear?
textByHashes.b26c631b8286b2a3711f18ea9f3cab02bc226df7: Good! My Arm said you needed camel dung to grow goutweed. But goat dung is similar enough - I will make my trolls build farming patches from goat dung instead.
textByHashes.89c86ff4da66504de5be7e57546dc758862ea31f: I have searched through Odd Mushroom's possessions. Sadly much of his research has been lost. I have copied what I could find into a book for you.
textByHashes.0c8324cf1fec482077b346611544eaeabb655f10: He would have wanted you to have it - some of his inventions are not useful here, but you are a traveller and may find places to use them.
textByHashes.5167967b333e3ed5982747a610ac98c3d1896ffe: When we have finished here, I would like you to try the Fire of Nourishment. Although Boulder made two herb patches as we told him, crops will not grow without such a fire to strengthen them.
textByHashes.3dd4916042055c314e7804266f85176a37760194: That is right, . You can mine the salts in the cave below, next to the prison.
textByHashes.be992ce9a0c03ae0c70aa6bb92f916a9b82333e1: Now, let us thank you for bringing us together, for saving our lives and for marrying us...
textByHashes.97185ddaff7cd77600ccd67f5975064cf4481369: Thank you for getting our herb patches to work. Now Boulder can grow goutweed for my people, and they are very happy.
textByHashes.08ffaa95e53560acee62d5074c3940903655260a: I don't think so... The only newcomers we've had here recently are those two strange trolls outside. I hope they're not up to no good.
textByHashes.2d4b9aed5b59d145ebeb9c2a20759e4aefa31a34: Well there's two strange trolls outside who I'm sure I haven't seen before. I hope they're not up to no good.
textByHashes.be63ab31361ff8d934a01ba0fbf0ccdb08d0b223: There was the cave-in recently down there as well. That's what Goat Poo was investigating when he saw the shadow.
textByHashes.188007c199af27415157ebb6f8adedcdfd332a27: Goat Poo was investigating the cave-in down there when he says he saw a shadow. Could be worth a look.
textByHashes.8cc7e221dfe778f0ed3af5115e1b1a73a1e1b677: Yes, I have another copy for you.
textByHashes.ccb1177cfe62b04ad8d23441a17d0ab5f6fff807: Let's not get ahead of ourselves, dear! But the town is thriving; my people are much happier now they are no longer terrified of Father.
textByHashes.c9b5a0d46437b3ef00ac590de7e3928711d9150c: You will always be welcome back.
